narrative:
Canfield City has 5,854 registered voters, with 53.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 25.7%, a modest Democratic lean of 4.7 percentage points.
